headline: IRM- A Data Storage REIT with a Great Long-Term Track Record
summary: Iron Mountain Inc. (IRM) is an information management service provider operating as a Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT). It’s a global data powerhouse with $6.9 billion in annual revenue that serves over 240,000 customers in 61 countries, notes Tom Hutchinson, editor of Cabot Dividend Investor.
